text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide and I are walking past the train
station when she suddenly remembers something
and stops in her tracks.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: By the way, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Do you remember that cafe we tried going to the
other day?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I'm still baffled as to why it was closed so
early. Do you mind if we go back and check it
out?

And with that request, we make our way to the
cafe together.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: It closes at 8 p.m., so it should still be open...

We're almost at the cafe when we see someone
who appears to be the owner pulling down the
shutters.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: It seems like it. I wonder why. I'll go ask.
I follow her as she approaches the owner.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me. Have your store hours changed
recently? I thought you were supposed to be
open for a while yet.

text_block_list.name: Cafe Owner
text_block_list.text:
Terribly sorry about that, but yes, we've been
closing a little early lately.

text_block_list.name: Cafe Owner
text_block_list.text:
It just doesn't make sense to stay open when we
get no customers.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: You don't?

text_block_list.name: Cafe Owner
text_block_list.text:
No... Not since that new place down the street run
by some famous celebrity barista opened up.

text_block_list.name: Cafe Owner
text_block_list.text: Business dried up as soon as that place started. Honestly, we might have to close up shop permanently soon.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: That can't be...

There's no question as to what cafe that must be.
No doubt, it's the one I visited with Biwa
Hayahide the other day.

text_block_list.name: Cafe Owner
text_block_list.text:
Up until recently, we managed to scrape by
somehow.

text_block_list.name: Cafe Owner
text_block_list.text:
We've come up with seasonal menu items and
listened to the requests of our regulars...

text_block_list.name: Cafe Owner
text_block_list.text:
But no matter what we do, it's not enough to
compete against a famous barista.

text_block_list.name: Cafe Owner
text_block_list.text:
It makes sense. When someone like that, with
both skills and fame, opens a shop down the
street, there's not much a small cafe like us can
do.

Biwa Hayahide's expression clouds as she mulls
over the matter.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I understand how you feel. However...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
What I love most about your cafe is how cozy its
atmosphere is and what a wonderful person you
are.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
And those things are all a result of how much
effort you've put into making your customers
happy.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You've accomplished so much already. Why don't
you try just a little harder and see what comes of
it?

Her impassioned speech is inspiring. I feel as
though it's enough to fire anyone up. However...

text_block_list.name: Cafe Owner
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. Your kind words mean a great deal to
me.

text_block_list.name: Cafe Owner
text_block_list.text:
But running a business isn't easy. Sometimes, you
just have to cut your losses.

Unfortunately, Biwa Hayahide's encouragement
isn't enough to spur the owner into further action.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I suppose life is difficult no matter what one
pursues.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I only wish there was something I could do to
help...

Pursuing a dream is tough. She knows that better
than anyone.
choice_data_list:
If only the cafe could do something to set it
apart...
Maybe we can help promote the cafe.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Set it apart... Yes, that's it!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I go there all the time! I would know better than
anyone how it can best stand out!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
This information might be just what we need to
change the owner's mind!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for helping me come up with something I
can do!

I have high hopes that Biwa Hayahide can get
through to the owner as we walk home together.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I guess, realistically speaking, that's about all we
can do.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But simply promoting the cafe probably won't
yield any significant results...
choice_data_list: If only we had something to work with...
If only we had something to work with...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But of course! If there's nothing to work with yet,
we can start from scratch and try to catch
people's attention with a new idea!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'll start putting together everything we need
once I get back!
choice_data_list: Let me know if I can help.
Let me know if I can help.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much. I'm going to make sure that
cafe stays in business!

With that strong declaration, it's clear that Biwa
Hayahide is filled with determination.
